title: Principal Plant Manager at Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies:
Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies!
